body.docName: 根据表单ID查询自定义字段
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/form/customFields/eventSeqId/{eventSeqId} 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/form/customFields/eventSeqId/{eventSeqId} 
 ## 接口描述 
根据表单ID查询自定义字段 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"100"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"ARRAY","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"seqId","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"40953","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"name","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%80%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"AMOUNT","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"required","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%BF%85%E9%A1%BB%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"printEnable","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%B0%E5%BC%80%E5%85%B3","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"summaryEnable","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E8%AE%A1%E5%BC%80%E5%85%B3","exampleValue":"0","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"description","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC","exampleValue":"%E8%BF%99%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5","desc":"","maxLength":"512"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"length","required":false,"label":"%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E6%A1%86%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"1000","desc":"","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"suffix","required":false,"label":"%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%90%8E%E7%BC%80","exampleValue":"%25","desc":"","maxLength":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"intege ## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|

调用方式

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数
